rows.label: qev035602_MSG0002
rows.name:
No... Go away somewhere!
At this rate, I'll...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035602_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask if you aren't going
to live together in NLA.

rows.label: qev035602_SEL0021
rows.name:
Express disappointment at Slovity's
betrayal and convey your sadness.

rows.label: qev035602_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ah... I had just recently... come to
accept living together with you all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035602_MSG0004
rows.name:
No! I had... recently come to
like this city called NLA...[ST:wait ]
